footer.tagline: Personalised supplement stacks, made for just you. Grounded in the published evidence, sourced from trusted retailers.
footer.rights: For informational use only, not medical advice.

landing.eyebrow: Evidence-graded · every claim cited · no house brand
landing.sub: Three ways in. Each ends with a clear stack you can buy from iHerb or Amazon in one click.
landing.card1Desc: Answer a few questions about how you sleep, eat, and feel. We match you to evidence-backed ingredients.
landing.card2Desc: Pick from 200+ researched ingredients, and we check it for interactions and dosing.
landing.card3Desc: Already taking supplements? Paste your stack and get an instant, evidence-graded score.
landing.trust3: No house brand, no built-in bias
landing.ctaSub: Free, evidence-based, and we don't sell our own pills.
landing.englishNote: Detailed ingredient guides are currently in English.
